content.en:
Interior of the valley.

Ye Tian and Yun Lan Juggernaut picked one elixir after another, these elixirs were all top-level elixirs in the universe, and many of them could improve their cultivation talents.

"Nine-Colored Sky Crystal Grass!"

When Lord Yunlan saw this elixir, he hurriedly went up and carefully picked it, for fear of damaging the Nine Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass.

"A total of three Nine-Colored Heavenly Crystal Grasses!"

Ye Tian glanced around and muttered.

In addition to the Nine-Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass, there are many elixirs comparable to the Nine-Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass, but they are not used to improve cultivation talents, but to improve other aspects.

For example, it is used to refine the body, refine the soul, and improve the understanding.

"Many of these elixirs are even of great use to the Kunwu Supreme, although the Kunwu Supreme and other supremes are not anti-heavenly, they can also slowly refine the body and soul at the supreme level, but it is more difficult, but these elixirs can make them improve their strength a little, and they can be used to trade with them!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian and Yun Lan Juggernaut had harvested a total of tens of thousands of elixirs, and this was only this piece of elixir, there were still many elixirs in the depths of the real valley.

"Keep going, there are still many elixirs in the depths of the valley!"

Ye Tiandao.

Lord Yunlan nodded for a moment, and then followed Ye Tian deep into the valley.

Although there are still some misty beasts here, they are all weak little minions, and they can't hinder Ye Tian's footsteps at all, and all the misty beasts that dare to attack here all die in Ye Tian's hands.

Deep in the valley.

This is the lair of that supreme-level misty beast, and there are at least more than 100,000 elixirs growing here.

"There are a lot of elixirs that can help me cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique!"

Ye Tian calculated.

However, his Chaos Golden Desolation Technique was already at the eighth layer of the Great Perfection Realm, but it would be very difficult to advance to the Eighth Layer Perfection Realm, and these elixirs were only a very small part of the elixirs that had an effect on him, so they might not be able to really help him break the bottleneck and advance to the eighth layer of the Perfection Realm.

This time, it took Ye Tian and Yun Lan to finally pick all these elixirs.

Subsequently, Ye Tian searched for a long time in the entire valley and found tens of thousands of elixirs.

"It's time to get out!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Hmm!"

Lord Yunlan nodded, but he was a little reluctant, there are really too many elixirs here, although almost all of them have been picked, but there may be many elixirs that have not been found.

However, since Ye Tian said to leave, she naturally had to leave.

"Can't be too greedy!"

Yun Lan dominates the dark path.

Soon, the two came out of the valley.

"Sister Commander, Lord Fa Tianjug, you guys are out!"

The Plum Garden Juggernaut breathed a sigh of relief.

Before, she also sensed the aura that erupted in the depths of the valley, and that aura made her extremely desperate, far surpassing the ordinary Heavenly Venerable Misty Beast, and it was even possible to reach the Supreme Level!

But even though she knew that it was dangerous inside, she didn't dare to move, so she could only wait for the result.

Now that Ye Tian and Yun Lan have come out, she is naturally completely relieved.

"It's out, and it's a big catch!"

Yun Lan dominated.

Subsequently, Yun Lan Juggernaut and Ye Tian took out all the elixirs they had harvested.

Then, Ye Tian took away the elixir worth eighty percent, among which the Nine Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass, he took two plants.

He doesn't need the Nine Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass, but the Terran needs it, the Terran is at the level of Dominating the Extreme Cultivation, but there are many ancient beings.

Although these ancient beings were not Supreme Highnesses at the beginning, with great perseverance and great chance, all of them were comparable to Tianzun in terms of combat effectiveness, but it was a pity that they were a little unlucky, and they never got the elixir of the Nine Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass.

If these two elixirs were brought back, it would be enough to give birth to two supremes.

The masters of Mei Yuan also wanted the Nine Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass, but these elixirs were almost the work of Ye Tian alone, so they naturally didn't dare to ask for the Nine Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass.

Soon, the elixir was distributed.

Ye Tian occupies eighty percent alone, Yunlan dominates one percent, and the remaining one percent is divided into the people of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group.

It can be said that everyone has gained a lot.

"Next, our Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group won't have to come out to adventure for millions of years!"

Yunlan Juggernaut said excitedly.

"You're leaving, if you're leaving, I'll send you out of the inner area and back to the outer area. "

Ye Tiandao.

"Then trouble the Fa Heavenly Master!"

Yun Lan dominated.

"It's just a trivial matter!And this time, if you hadn't brought me to this valley, I wouldn't have gained so much, and in the inner area of the Misty Region, a treasure like this is absolutely rare!" Ye Tiandao.

The group returned, and soon came to the Misty River.

This time, they seemed to be lucky, they didn't encounter the Heavenly Venerable-level Mist Beast, and easily returned to the outer area.

Then, Ye Tian escorted for another distance, and only stopped when he was close to the outside world.

"I'll send it here, for the rest of the journey, you just need to be careful, there should be no danger!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Thank you, Lord Fa Tian!"

Everyone of the Yunmeng Mist Mercenary Group responded.

Everyone also knows very well that this time apart, it is estimated that it will be difficult to meet again in the future.

Suddenly.

Lord Yunlan asked curiously: "Fa Tian Juggernaut, although it is a bit presumptuous, but I really want to know, what is your true identity, Fa Tian Juggernaut should be your pseudonym, right?"

Ye Tian was silent for a while, and suddenly smiled: "My name is Ye Tian!"

After speaking, Ye Tian left.

"Ye Tian!"

Lord Yunlan muttered a few words to himself, and then suddenly shocked: "I know who he is!"

"Who is it?"

The Plum Garden Juggernaut and the others were curious.

"The first genius of the human race, and the first genius of the universe, is known as the strongest son of the era in history - the master of ten thousand laws!"

Yun Lan dominated.

"What, Master of Ten Thousand Laws, that legendary genius all the way, it is rumored that he has a very short cultivation time, and his age is very small, but his progress is too fast, and even those sons of the twelve universe epochs are not his opponents. "The Lord of the Plum Garden worshipped.

"yes, I should have guessed a long time ago. A person in the universe who can possess such terrifying strength at the master level will naturally not be unknown, and only that master of ten thousand laws has such strength!

Lord Yunlan sighed.

She even had a feeling that it wouldn't be long before the Lord of Ten Thousand Laws would no longer be the Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, but the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws, and it would not be a problem to even move the entire universe and surpass the First God Lord of the Protoss.

......

Ye Tian returned to the inner area.

For him, informing the Yunlan Juggernaut is nothing, even if the Yunlan Juggernaut and others reveal his identity, but now there are few supremes who want to capture him.

And once you dare to do something to him, it is tantamount to offending a son of the era against the sky, who would dare to do this?

So, he is not afraid at all!
